welcome.title: Welcome
welcome.body_1_1: To get you started we have created your first wallet for you. All the details and back up options for your wallet can be found in
welcome.body_2_3: your wallet to make sure its safe should you lose your phone

login.title: Welcome to neonwallet
login.body: We are creating your first wallet, would you like to set up security to keep your assets protected?

passcode.error: Passcodes did not match. Try again

feature1.title: The original wallet on the move
feature1.subtitle: All the best features of our desktop wallet  plus more in the palm of you hand

feature2.title: First class user experience
feature2.subtitle: Neon Wallet has been designed to make managing your crypto assets as intuitive as possible

feature3.title: BIP39 wallet
feature3.subtitle: BIP39 wallet standard, create infinite child accounts using a single mnemonic

feature4.title: Packed pipeline of updates
feature4.subtitle: The team is working around the clock to bring you the latest new features

getStarted.title: Packed pipeline of updates
getStarted.subtitle: The team is working around the clock to bring you the latest new features

step1CreateWallet.header: Certe, inquam, pertinax non fuisse torquem detraxit hosti et quidem rerum necessitatibus non fuisse torquem saepe.
step1CreateWallet.body_1: This set of secret words make it easy to back up and restore your account. This makes your wallet really secure
step1CreateWallet.body_2: It’s really important you remember your phrase correctly so we will help you with that. If you’re in a rush you can do it another time.
step1CreateWallet.label_3: Give your wallet a name and create a Passphrase
step1CreateWallet.body_3: Give your wallet a memorable name and passphrase and your ready to go!

step2CreateWallet.body_1: Below you will find your secret phrase
step2CreateWallet.body_2: Write this phrase down on a piece of paper or record it in a secure digital note. You can also download it below but be sure to keep it safe.
step2CreateWallet.body_3: Anyone with this phrase will be able to steal your hard earned assets and you won’t be able to get them back!
step2CreateWallet.dialog_title: Make sure you keep your security phrase safe
step2CreateWallet.dialog_body: In order to keep your security phrase safe make sure it’s saved in an encrypted note.

step3CreateWallet.body_1: Please select each phrase in the correct order to make sure you’ve got it right.
step3CreateWallet.body_2: Don’t worry you can find your secret phrase in the settings for the wallet. Go ahead and skip this step if you really need to.
step3CreateWallet.dialog_1_title: Are you sure you want to skip back up confirmation?
step3CreateWallet.dialog_1_body: Confirming that you have correctly backed up your security phrase is highly recommended
step3CreateWallet.dialog_2_body: Please try again to confirm your back up

step4CreateWallet.label_1: Give your wallet a name and create a Passphrase
step4CreateWallet.body_1: Give your wallet a memorable name, maybe it could be related to what you want to use the wallet for like “trading” or “investments”.

step5CreateWallet.label_1: Congratulations, You’re the proud owner of a shiny new wallet!
step5CreateWallet.body_1: Remember to keep your secret phrase safe, having several backups is always a good idea.
step5CreateWallet.body_2: If you need to find out a wallets secret phrase you can find it in the settings page for that wallet.
